main.name: Nishant Sethi
main.description: Senior Software Architect specializing in scalable React ecosystems, distributed Node.js microservices, and AI-driven data pipelines
main.bio: I am a Senior Software Engineer III at JP Morgan with a decade of experience designing resilient cloud infrastructure and high-performance frontend applications. My expertise bridging the gap between sophisticated system architecture and flawless user experiences enables teams to ship mission-critical software with confidence.
main.contactmessage: Interested in consulting, architectural reviews, or discussing distributed systems? Let's connect.

resume.skillmessage: I architect and build battle-tested web applications with an emphasis on performance, scalability, and automated infrastructure (IaC).

education.description: Specialized in Distributed Systems, Data Structures, and Advanced Machine Learning algorithms.

work.title: Senior Software Engineer III
work.description: Spearheaded the migration of legacy monolithic architectures to highly available AWS-backed microservices. Led the frontend orchestration of the core trading dashboard using React and Redux, improving client-side rendering latency by 40%. Implemented robust CI/CD pipelines using Terraform and GitHub Actions to ensure zero-downtime, fully automated deployments.

work.title: Specialist Programmer
work.description: Engineered scalable Enterprise Data Pipelines utilizing Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Mentored junior developers in architectural best practices, enforcing strict Test-Driven Development (TDD) coverage. Successfully reduced technical debt by refactoring core API endpoints to run asynchronously, resulting in a 200% increase in request throughput.

projects.title: MERN Stack WhatsApp Clone
projects.category: Real-time Messaging Pipeline via WebSockets (MongoDB, ExpressJS, ReactJS, NodeJS)

projects.title: Amazon Clone With Firebase
projects.category: E-Commerce Architecture featuring Stripe Payment integration (ReactJS, Redux)

projects.title: Instagram Clone With Firebase
projects.category: High-throughput Image Rendering & Feed Pagination (MERN Stack + Firebase Auth)

projects.title: Spotify Clone With Firebase
projects.category: Media Streaming Platform Integration using Spotify Web API (Context API & Redux)

testimonials.text: I rarely come across real talents who stand out like Nishant. I had the pleasure of working with Nishant for one year at Infosys, managing on a project team. Nishant’s ability to handle the project was unlike any I’ve seen before and made a dramatic increase in the productivity level of our company. No matter how tense a meeting, he made sure he is always calm. As a team member or a leader, Nishant earns my highest recommendation

I met Nishant during a Developer Training Session in Infosys and collaborated with him over few project assignments. Nishant immediately struck me as a very enthusiastic, intelligent person with a hungry for more attitude. I was particularly impressed with his methodical approach to analyze & break down complex problems and then start to solutionize it. His communication skills especially showcase relevant examples and metaphors to convey an idea was impressive. Nishant will be an asset to any team & organization he works for.
